creator: jas@corpus-callosum.com
text:
Earlier attempts to use MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes never worked and
would output the same errors.

I did a full ports rebuild after backing out some ports (openssl,
krb5-based) and have so far not seen the error again.  The rebuild
updated Perl from 5.14 to 5.16.

Thanks.


On Oct 28, 2013, at 2:47 AM, Dmitry Sivachenko <trtrmitya@gmail.com> wrote:

> I am unable to reproduce this so far.
> Can you please add MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes to the Makefile and
> try again to compile the port?
> 
> (and if it fails, please post the output again)
> 
> Thanks.
